title: Bike Sharing — Relationships
description: How the variables relate: a bubble scatter, the hour×weekday heatmap, a scatter-plot matrix, parallel coordinates, and a correlation network.

blocks.title: Average ridership by hour × weekday
blocks.description: The commuter signature: twin 8am/5pm ridges on weekdays, a midday dome on weekends.

blocks.title: Feature correlation network (|r| ≥ 0.4)
blocks.description: Nodes are variables; an edge is a strong correlation, its width the strength.
